pages.text: 今天是一个特别的日子！爸爸在苏州工作，咘咘要和妈妈一起坐飞机，从深圳飞到苏州去看爸爸啦！
pages.text_en: Today was a special day! Daddy was working in Suzhou, and Bubu was going to fly with Mommy from Shenzhen to Suzhou to see him!

pages.text: 到了机场，咘咘看到好多好多人，还有长长的队伍。她紧紧拉着妈妈的手，眼睛瞪得圆圆的。"哇，机场好大呀！"
pages.text_en: At the airport, Bubu saw so many people and long lines. She held onto Mommy’s hand tightly, her eyes wide open. "Wow, the airport is so big!"

pages.text: 妈妈把登机牌递给咘咘，说："这是你的小票票哦，拿好它我们就可以上飞机啦！"咘咘把登机牌抱在怀里，觉得自己像个大人。
pages.text_en: Mommy handed Bubu the boarding pass and said: "This is your little ticket. Hold onto it, and we can get on the plane!" Bubu hugged the ticket tightly, feeling very grown-up.

pages.text: 飞机好大好大！咘咘走进机舱，摸摸软软的座椅，看看圆圆的小窗户。"妈妈，飞机真的会飞到天上吗？"
pages.text_en: The plane was so big! Bubu walked into the cabin, touched the soft seats, and looked at the round little windows. "Mommy, will the plane really fly in the sky?"

pages.text: 飞机开始跑啦！轰隆隆——越跑越快，咘咘抓紧了妈妈的手。突然，飞机飞起来了！咘咘的肚子痒痒的，她咯咯笑了。
pages.text_en: The plane started moving! Rumble rumble—it went faster and faster. Bubu held Mommy’s hand tightly. Suddenly, the plane lifted off! Bubu’s tummy felt ticklish, and she giggled.

pages.text: 咘咘趴在窗户上往外看。房子变得像积木一样小，河流像一条亮亮的丝带。"妈妈你看！云朵就在旁边！好像棉花糖！"
pages.text_en: Bubu leaned on the window to look outside. Houses looked like little building blocks, and the river like a shiny ribbon. "Mommy, look! The clouds are so close! They look like cotton candy!"

pages.text: 空姐阿姨给咘咘送来一杯果汁和一包小饼干。咘咘说："谢谢阿姨！"空姐阿姨笑着摸摸她的头："小兔子真有礼貌！"
pages.text_en: The flight attendant brought Bubu a cup of juice and a bag of cookies. Bubu said: "Thank you!" The flight attendant smiled and patted her head: "What a polite little bunny!"

pages.text: 飞机降落啦！轱辘轱辘——稳稳地停下来。咘咘拍着小手说："我坐飞机啦！我好勇敢！"
pages.text_en: The plane landed! Rumble rumble—it stopped smoothly. Bubu clapped her little hands and said: "I rode a plane! I’m so brave!"

pages.text: 走出机场，爸爸已经在出口等着她们啦！咘咘飞扑过去："爸爸！爸爸！我坐飞机来找你啦！"爸爸一把抱起咘咘，亲了亲她的额头。
pages.text_en: Out of the airport, Daddy was already waiting at the exit! Bubu ran to him: "Daddy! Daddy! I flew on a plane to find you!" Daddy picked her up and kissed her forehead.

pages.text: 💡 咘咘今天学到了：和妈妈一起去新的城市看爸爸，虽然有点紧张，但新地方有好多好玩的，还能交到新朋友。一家人在一起，哪里都是家。
pages.text_en: 💡 Bubu learned today: Traveling to a new city with Mommy to see Daddy can be a little nerve-wracking, but there’s so much fun waiting and even new friends to meet. As long as family is together, anywhere feels like home.
